name: Perfect Sync - A-Un
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>阿</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>吽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>呼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>吸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: You can add 1 "Dual Avatar" monster from your Deck to your hand. If you control a "Dual Avatar" Effect Monster: You can Special Summon 1 "Dual Avatar Spirit Token" (Warrior/LIGHT/Level 2/ATK 0/DEF 0), also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Fusion Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Perfect Sync - A-Un" once per turn. You can only activate 1 "Perfect Sync - A-Un" per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: You can add 1 "Dual Avatar" monster from your Deck to your hand. If you control a "Dual Avatar" Effect Monster: You can Special Summon 1 "Dual Avatar Spirit Token" (Warrior/LIGHT/Level 2/ATK 0/DEF 0), also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Fusion Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Perfect Sync - A-Un" once per turn. You can only activate 1 "Perfect Sync - A-Un" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
